faqs.question: How much does carpenter ant control cost in Dobbs Ferry?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ant control in Dobbs Ferry typically ranges from $350 to $2,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and treatment method required. Smaller infestations in single-family homes start around $350, while extensive colony elimination in larger or multi-level properties can reach $2,000. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before any work begins.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have carpenter ants in my Dobbs Ferry home?
faqs.answer: Signs of carpenter ants include piles of wood shavings (frass) near baseboards or windowsills, hollow-sounding wood when tapped, rustling sounds inside walls, and sightings of large black ants especially in spring. Dobbs Ferry's older homes are particularly susceptible. If you notice winged ants indoors during warmer months or damaged wood around windows and doors, contact us immediately for an inspection.

faqs.question: Are carpenter ants common in Dobbs Ferry, NY?
faqs.answer: Yes, carpenter ants are very common in Dobbs Ferry due to the abundance of mature trees, wooden structures, and moisture from Hudson River proximity. The village's historic homes with wooden frames, decks, and porches provide ideal nesting sites. Spring through fall are peak seasons when carpenter ants are most active, making preventative treatment essential for Dobbs Ferry property owners.

faqs.question: How quickly can you treat my Dobbs Ferry home for carpenter ants?
faqs.answer: We typically schedule carpenter ant inspections in Dobbs Ferry within 24-48 hours of your call, with treatment beginning immediately upon approval. Most treatments are completed in one visit lasting 1-3 hours, though severe infestations may require follow-up appointments. Our emergency services are available for urgent situations threatening structural integrity.
